userErrors.message: To update emailMarketingConsent, please use the customerEmailMarketingConsentUpdate Mutation instead
To update smsMarketingConsent, please use the customerSmsMarketingConsentUpdate Mutation instead
To update whatsAppMarketingConsent, please use the customerWhatsAppMarketingConsentUpdate Mutation instead
An email address is required to set the email marketing consent state.
A phone number is required to set the SMS consent state.
A phone number is required to set the WhatsApp consent state.
